mnemonics.title: P and V
mnemonics.content: P = Probeer (Dutch 'try'), V = Verhoog (Dutch 'increment') - Dijkstra's original notation

acronyms.expansion: Synchronization Element Managing Access & Preventing Hazardous Overlapping Resource Execution

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a toll booth - cars (processes) wait in line (queue) when toll counter (semaphore) is busy

analogies.analogy: Single bathroom key - only one person can enter at a time
